title: Ten thousand agents, and none of them can tell a command from an attack
excerpt: Prompt injection isn't a bug you patch — it's baked into how these models work. So the fix can't be a one-time audit. You need an attacker that never stops.

title: How I'd build an autonomous red team for AI agents
excerpt: Part one made the case for a continuous adversary. This is the architecture — eight components, traced with one planted injection.
